title: Electricity supply licence exemption: JG Pears Power Limited
body: "We’re seeking views on a proposed exemption from the requirement to hold a supply licence for JG Pears Power Limited in respect of a 37 MW supply of electricity to the Green Energy Business Park, High Marnham, Nottinghamshire.  Please send responses by close of play on 6 May 2025 to:  chris.chown@energysecurity.gov.uk  "

taxons.title: Energy industry and infrastructure licensing and regulation
